expression.label: Text46
expression.exp: "Attention! The tension cable can not be in compression!"

caption.val: hide reaction forces in force diagram

expression.label: text15
expression.exp:
"reaction forces mode=1 loadline step4: A: Vector (L, K_1) B: Vector (K_1, D)
reaction forces mode=0 loadline step=0, step>=5: A: Vector (C, O_1) B: Vector (O_1, P_1)"
